name: Pork Chops and Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Boil and slice the sweet potatoes.
3. Salt and pepper the pork chops and dredge them in flour.
4. Brown the pork chops in shortening.
5. Melt butter in a separate bowl.
6. Stir in currant jelly, orange juice, and lemon rind.
7. Add the remaining ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring until well blended.
8. Arrange the sweet potatoes and pork chops in a casserole dish.
9. Cover with 6 tablespoons of sauce.
10. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes, basting occasionally.
